title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Law, Luffy, Garp, Unknown person #11 as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND THEN... THE DAY OF THE REVERIE ARRIVED.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: THE SEAS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: of this world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are split into four regions by a great wall known as the red line...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: North Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Holy Land Mariejois

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with the unforgiving sea that Luffy and his crew have been adventuring on, the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government is a huge entity that is a collection of 170 allied countries from around the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Most of the countries in this world are part of it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Moreover, 50 kings and representatives are chosen out of those countries...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to gather here in this holy land every four years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please take your seats!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This large conference that is about to take place is known as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...Hmm, Wano isn't an allied country.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: In other words, it's a lawless area...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we don't know if it has the proper structure of a country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: money has to be involved for the Marines to make a move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: After their attempted assassination of big mom...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Will they try for Kaido's head next!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How daring of him to cause a world- wide disturbance over and over again...

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: that straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You got that right!! Wahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What's so funny, produce!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The Chairman changes each time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Luffy-Kun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who is it this time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's nice to meet you all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ballywood, eh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's nice to meet you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Looks like this will be over quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may have seven days together, but even that's not enough to discuss everything...

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: ...All right now, kings of the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As usual, lets carefully discuss...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...The matters of this beautiful world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It looks like the conference has started...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: King cobra of Alabama has requested...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A meeting with us during this confer- once...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: The Nefertari family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were the only ones of the founding 20 members who decided to remain on the surface 800 years ago...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...In other words, they are traitors...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he figure something out...? Let's hope he doesn't make things complicated.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's this big mom and kaidou incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's been two years since the summit war... it seems that waves of disturbance cannot be prevented anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The balance of the world... cannot be maintained forever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like there is a need for a great cleansing.

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
